view.title: Validate explicit UC need #5

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for self-service redownload within policy constraints.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for self-service redownload within policy constraints.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Self-service redownload within policy constraints', but the evidence provided does not demonstrate this capability. While there are multiple successful prior steps indicating that customers can book offers and view their bookings, there is no direct evidence showing how self-service redownloads are managed or constrained by policy. The lack of specific checks or endpoints related to this requirement leads to a conclusion that the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
